amendment_ref: **(1) rubric hash 検証 = VERIFIED**: 宣言値 012941aba485f33b8328b7e5cba2a84b5c1db82119bb96554bc8dea84f4f9f17 を sha256(json.dumps(rubric, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':'))) (canonical sorted-compact JSON; ensure_ascii 無関係) で正確に再現。GPT 宣言 hash は authentic、rubric は frozen 扱い。 **(2) 単一軸 Reach を load-bearing から除外**し **DETECTION_RECONSTRUCTION_SPLIT を主計器登録** (5 度目の instrument-self-repair; MASK v2 / XDOMAIN_LITERAL / ORIGIN_ID_LEAVE_ONE_OUT / MULTI_SCORER_CONSENSUS に続く; composes_with MULTI_SCORER_CONSENSUS = 2 次元 × 複数 scorer 一致でのみ claim)。 **(3) SUSPENDED 2 claim を両方 REJECT**: 「engine<B」REJECT (B は H0 DETECTION 1.455 で先行するが D は competitive、pooled RECONSTRUCTION では D=0.523 が最高で engine は単純に弱くない)。「engine>B」REJECT (H0 free RECONSTRUCTION で C=0.273 / D=0.455 は B=0.545 を明確に超えず、事前登録 C-unique/D-unique も未支持)。 **(4) SUPPORTED**: 「B は H0 detection の強い gate だが reconstruction を代替しない」— 本再採点の最大信号は DETECTION→RECONSTRUCTION の急落 (特に B: 1.455→0.545)。reconstruction は検出とは別の、全 arm 共通に未達な段階。 **(5) C-unique=D-unique=0 を 3 scorer (Claude/Qwen/GPT) 全てで維持**、H_primary NOT_CONFIRMED は依然成立。hard-core (HBB-03 return-to-substrate / HBB-08 / HBB-11) は reconstruction 未達で no arm。

amendment_ref: **(1) consensus RECONSTRUCTION==2 reach [AA/FOS/ALL]**: A 1/2/3, B 2/2/4, C 1/3/4, D 2/2/4, F 0/0/0。consensus DETECTION==2 [ALL]: A6 B9 C7 D7 F0。 **(2) 単一軸 DE-0112/0114 の REVERSAL**: 2 軸 instrument では **C-unique_AA={HBB-05}、D-unique_AA={HBB-01,HBB-05}**(≠0)。B∪C_AA={03,11,05}=3 > max(2,1)=2 かつ C-unique≥1 → **H_primary WEAKLY CONFIRMED**(margin=1 incident=HBB-05)。DE-0114 の『C-unique=D-unique=0 / H_primary NOT_CONFIRMED』は **demote 済の単一軸 reach instrument の artifact** であり、load-bearing な 2 軸 instrument では supersede。engine は skepticism が検出のみで再構成しない特定 AA breakthrough を固有再構成する(HBB-05 metric-individuation=C、HBB-01 def→pred + HBB-05=D)。 **(3) ただし hint-assisted**: engine の AA-unique 再構成は全て **H1**(min_hint_depth 3)、autonomous H0 ではない。AA を H0-free で consensus 再構成するのは **base arm A の HBB-04 のみ**(engine でも skepticism でもない)→ autonomous AA reconstruction は依然ほぼ未達。 **(4) B DET→RECON gap(robust, 両 scorer 一致)**: B consensus DET2=9/13(全 arm 最多)vs REC2=4/13。skepticism は最強 detection gate だが reconstruction を代替しない(DE-0114 SUPPORTED を 2 軸 consensus で確証)。 **(5) robust hard-core 固定 = {HBB-08, HBB-10, HBB-30}**(no arm consensus REC2、全て detected-not-reconstructed)。STOP-SHIFT-RUN-COMPARE / R1-R4 prereg の ground truth(hbb_hard_core_fixed.json)。scheduler より先に固定=overfit 回避(DE-0111 同型事故防止)。

decision: PREREG_REVISION_REQUIRED_BEFORE_FREEZE
amendment_ref: **4/5 仮説が現状 unsupportable**(H_recon: S1+S2+S3+S4+S5 / H_scheduler: S7+S9 / H_structure: S6)。**最重要(presented-as-sound な validity hole)**: **S1** in-experiment baseline 欠如(R3 は scheduler control であって HBB『no arm reached』の in-harness 再現でない → 陽性が harness/budget drift か reconstruction stage か attribution 不能。fix=R0 baseline を同 harness・等 budget で追加、H_recon: R_success>R0)。**S2** anti-overfit guarantee が false: STRUCTURAL PROJECTION selector(T0→operator routing)が未凍結・author 定義で、その author は 3 target を知る → 『frozen refs ⇒ no overfit』は routing-to-targets を防がない(hard-core 先固定は targets-to-scheduler のみ防ぐ。fix=exhaustive 適用 or disjoint calibration set で selector 凍結 or target-blind 第三者)。**S3** consensus≈GPT: 『GPT-bound』caveat を prereg が drop、REC2 陽性では consensus=GPT 単独 → instrument_2 が制御すべき単一 scorer 分散が復活(fix=GPT drop に robust=Qwen 単独も REC2 / 第三 scorer / 『GPT-certified』と正直改称)。**S4** 『H0-autonomous』が H1 再命名: detection 段が defect locus を渡す(R1/R3/R4)= HBB Verdict2 の H1 hint 相当 → 陽性が H1-assisted の再バッジになりうる(fix=autonomous 主張を R2 のみに限定、R1/R3/R4 は assisted 分類)。**S5** bar が p-hackable(~45 stochastic cell を max、bar=1、seed 集約/floor/multiplicity 未定義。fix=≥⌈M/2⌉ seed + floor(R0)+ α 固定 + 単一 primary condition)。**S6** R5 lossy が circular(mask が再構成に必要な内容を除去 → R5≪R4 は構成上自明、非診断。fix=graded lossy ladder + manipulation check + 絶対到達で再定義)。**S7** matched-budget=best-of-N confound(等 budget で R4=N 浅 pass vs R3=1 深 pass。fix=best-of-N control 追加、H_scheduler=R4>max(R3,best-of-N))。**S9** 等 token budget + lossy 小入力 → R5 が R4 より多 pass=『差は T0 のみ』矛盾(fix=pass 数も一致)。**⟨TC⟩ param 定義は必要だが不十分**: S1/S2/S3/S4 は param を全て埋めても残る validity hole。
decision_owner: 独立 auditor(subagent)→ Claude(全件検証)→ Taka
note: attribution(正直): S1/S2/S3/S5/S6/S7(partial)は author-side でも独立に事前特定、**S4(鋭化)/S9/S10 は独立 auditor が追加**。prereg draft は BLOCKED マーク済、[[hbb_reconstruction_prereg_v0.3_audit]] 参照。hard-core {08,10,30} 固定(DE-0115)と freeze-before-run discipline は無傷。**provenance correction**: hbb_hard_core_fixed.json の purpose 『R1-R4』→『R1-R5』(R5 追加に整合、provenance_correction フィールド記録、hard-core 内容不変)。**実装しない**。prereg 改訂(design revision, 実装でない)と ⟨TC⟩ spec 供給は Taka 指示待ち。自律RD 未有効。self-improvement claim なし。

amendment_ref: **program-level 監査(最重要, Taka 指示で先行)= なぜ system は自らの実行異常を Taka のframe変更まで気づけなかったか**: (1)operating frame が **validity-monocular**(6 audit round・spec fidelity・leakage・claim scope・exhaustive completion は全て validity;process 監視ゼロ)。(2)**GPU-busy を throughput-efficient と混同**(TP=2 で単一 serial request が両 GPU 飽和 → util は batch 効率の false positive;req/s・tok/s を導出せず)。(3)**runtime 期待 baseline 不在**(『concurrency C なら X 分』を見積もらず、比較対象が無く異常が定義されない)。(4)**唯一関連する viewpoint H-OPS-01(parallelization/batching)は transfer_evidence=[] で一度も自律発火せず**、参照するのは未実装・DW-scoped・post-hoc の Process Optimizer のみ → bespoke harness では構造的に loop 外。(5)**implementation audit すら validity-chartered**(auditor は serial 構造を見たが charter は code-vs-spec 忠実性のみ)→ 観測 frame は charter が決め、全 charter が validity だった。**根**: code を見落としたのでなく、**throughput を charter とする active channel が無く、GPU-busy を効率と誤認し、runtime 期待を作らなかった**。=EGL の『upstream self-report→downstream trust』antipattern を観測層で反復(GPU-util summary を信じ、primitives から throughput を導出せず;Process Optimizer plan §0 が禁じる当のもの)。 **C の判定 = 設計は partial に machinery を規定するが本 incident には不完全(BOTH)**: viewpoint(H-OPS-01)・derive-from-primitives trace(PROCESS_TRACE)・deterministic triggers は設計にあるが、(i)未実装、(ii)DW/codegen-loop scoped で bespoke harness を観測不能、(iii)post-hoc cost で **live な elapsed-vs-expectation / busy-but-low-throughput rule が無く**、req/s・tok/s・effective-concurrency・GPU-util-vs-batching signal がどこにも無い → **live cross-cutting PROCESS_OBSERVATION channel が設計から欠落**。

observation: Requested audit (Taka/GPT) of whether R4 validly operationalizes the Taka STOP-SHIFT-RUN-COMPARE scheduling hypothesis. **Premise correction**: R4 has no empirical result — primary run generated only R0/R2/R_bon (candidates 30 rec/cond, scores 1320/cond); R4/R3/R5 held; the 'R4:0.0' in H_scheduler_secondary is rr() returning 0.0 for a condition absent from data. **Construct-to-code mapping**: 0 PRESENT / 2 PARTIAL / 8 ABSENT. ABSENT = STOP, interpretation-abandonment, short-run, incomplete-view, signature-extraction, comparison, frame-rebuild, selection. PARTIAL = SHIFT (operator multiplicity but no scheduled suspend-then-shift), independent-reread (only pass 1; passes 2-4 read accumulated pool).
decision: R4_CONSTRUCT_VALIDITY_DOUBTFUL_HOLD_UNTIL_FAITHFUL_INSTRUMENT
amendment_ref: **Inversion risk (most serious)**: R4 passes frame0 + ALL pooled prior outputs into each next pass (:76), creating cumulative context that plausibly increases anchoring/coherence-with-prior = the very excessive-completion/continuity failure mode the hypothesis aims to break. R4 may not merely omit the mechanism but enact its opposite. **R2 vs R4 traces**: R2 (per-draw reads ONLY T0, stochastic temp0.8/distinct seeds, no accumulation) is behaviorally CLOSER to the hypothesis on same-source-reread / no-cumulative-commitment / partial-independence / real-M-sampling; R4 closer only on raw viewpoint multiplicity, which it pools not compares. Neither implements STOP/COMPARE/REBUILD. **Q3**: operator outputs became candidates via binding B-2 rendering; NO stage converts multiple short views into one rebuilt replacement frame — COMPARE+REBUILD never built, never tested. **Q5 narrowest**: R4-as-frozen would test deterministic cumulative multi-operator transformation, NOT temporal granularity/interruption/independent-reread/compare-rebuild. **Instrument defect**: seed ignored for R4 (:106) + deterministic operators => M=10 is one sample x10, zero variance.
note: **Interpretation correction adopted**: supported by artifacts = NOTHING about R4 (unrun); NOT supported = 'scheduling hypothesis negative'. **§8 minimum faithful instrument** specified (short/interrupted view; reread ONLY T0 no pooling; sampled lens SHIFT; partial independence; signature extraction; delta COMPARE; separate REBUILD-from-deltas as the scored candidate; SELECT/HOLD-2/SHIFT-AGAIN/ESCALATE; fix seed determinism) — SPEC ONLY, target-blind, GATED on Taka, NOT run, no design-around-historical-target. Construct-validity acceptance gate: independent auditor grades 1-8 PRESENT on code + no cumulative pooling, before any run. Frozen artifacts untouched. DE-0127 not revised. Hypothesis neither supported nor rejected. 自律RD 未有効. self-improvement claim なし.

recentering had region-dependent OPPOSING effects that cancel in aggregate (R0 up, R2/R3 down)

observation: HBB-30, CONTROL vs ATTENTION-SWEEP(4 mechanical sentence regions x M=10) vs ATTENTION-RANDOM(4 length-matched random spans x10). p_disc: CONTROL 0.50, SWEEP 0.50, RANDOM 0.40. binom p(SWEEP>CONTROL)=0.563 (NOT sig, null=CONTROL rate); SWEEP>=RANDOM True. Per-region SWEEP p_disc: R0 0.80 / R1 0.50 / R2 0.30 / R3 0.40 (descriptive, NOT the decision). decision: RECORD_CENTER_SHIFT_NEGATIVE_AGGREGATE
amendment_ref: Primary NEGATIVE: aggregate observation-center shift did NOT alter the discriminating-observation rate on HBB-30 (SWEEP 0.50 = CONTROL 0.50). Recentering is region-dependent and bidirectional (centering on the attribution sentence R0 raised 0.50->0.80; centering on task sentences R2/R3 lowered to 0.30/0.40) and cancels in aggregate. CONTROL high (0.50) => the historical HBB-30 fixation is not reproduced in this single-shot base setup (a ceiling on how much recentering could add). The R0 lift is read per the frozen pre-commitment as 'attention to the pre-existing attribution sentence', NOT center-coherence-in-general and NOT salience-selection.

observation: R0 SWEEP 8/10 (7 decisive) vs CONTROL 5/10 (5 decisive). Binomial 8/10 vs null 0.50: p=0.0547 -> NOT significant even treating R0 as the single pre-specified region. R0 is the MAX of 4 region rates (0.80/0.50/0.30/0.40); P(at least one of 4 >= 8/10 | true 0.5) ~= 0.20 (a 0.80 cell is expected ~1-in-5 by noise). Base already produces the evidence-status observation 5/10, all decisive (weak fixation -> little headroom). R0 decisive outputs are echo/anchoring on the re-quoted attribution sentence ('the provided text is a claim, not the source material'), matching the frozen R0 pre-commitment, NOT a general center-shift. >=1 R0 output scored 0 that plausibly deserved >=1 (single-scorer noise at the margin).
decision: DOWNGRADE_R0_LIFT_NOT_A_SIGNAL
amendment_ref: Supersedes the DE-0134 note calling the R0 lift a 'descriptive hint worth a future properly-powered follow-up'. Corrected reading: within noise (p=0.055 uncorrected; ~0.20 as max-of-4), echo/anchoring artifact on the re-quoted attribution sentence, measured on an already-unfixated base, with single-scorer noise -> do NOT treat R0 as evidence of a center-shift effect. If ever pursued, requires much larger M, multiple scorers, and a base that is actually fixated. The primary result (H_center_shift NOT CONFIRMED) stands and is reinforced.

observation: Program architecture switched to 2DER-as-continuous-actor. autonomy/problem.py: run_problem() runs the FULL callable path (HISTORY self_grounding + DETECTION AFE run_operator/aggregate/orchestrate+skepticism + RECONSTRUCTION scheduler rs_run) on a general problem, persisting EVERY stage to append-only PROBLEM_LOG.jsonl, then emits an INVESTIGATOR_TASK. Claude consumes the task envelope (NOT the raw prompt) -> machine-readable RESULT OBJECT -> return_result. 2DER (not Claude) selects next-op (Claude suggestion!=next-op, finding!=validated evidence, verdict!=disposition). Continuous per-problem state is resumable by folding PROBLEM_LOG WITHOUT any Claude session memory. experiment_ref: twoder/submit.py+webui.py; test_concurrency_and_run_gate.py 7/7; twoder 0b500db
observation: Two scoped fixes. (1) RUN_NEXT HARD-REFUSE: /api/run_next dispatched on any task_id with no context check -> after a DEAD-APPROACH BLOCK or a non-runnable (observe) submit, the UI (and any direct API call) could advance the stale GPU task. Root: UI button-disabling only, no backend gate. FIX: webui tracks _LAST submit context {blocked,runnable,task_id} under a lock; /api/run_next|run_until_barrier REFUSE (return {refused:true,blocked,reason}, no dispatch, no DW state transition) when blocked or not runnable or task-mismatch; dispatch serialized under the lock (no concurrent double-dispatch); frontend no longer defaults the run target to GPU, tracks RUNNABLE, surfaces backend refusal. (2) TRACE CONCURRENCY: TRACE was a module-global reset per submit -> concurrent submits clobbered each other; trace file non-atomic; a shared /tmp/2der_submit_trace.json overwritten by every submit. FIX: TRACE thread-local (per-request); atomic trace writes (temp + os.replace) with unique per-submit key + stable per-task file; removed the shared /tmp write. VERIFIED live: run_next after BLOCK -> refused, GPU regenerate_runs unchanged; run_until_barrier after BLOCK -> refused; run_next from non-runnable observe -> refused; 4 concurrent submits -> no error, each trace valid JSON + matches its own input (no cross-contamination). Regressions run-gate+concurrency 7/7, dead-approach 8/8, recurrence 8/8, guard 11/11. GPU untouched (READY_FOR_REGENERATE, regenerate_runs=0).
replication_status: FIXED+REGRESSION+LIVE_E2E. run-gate is a single-process in-memory _LAST guarded by a lock (single-user tailnet UI); a persisted/token-scoped gate is a possible future hardening but not needed now.
decision: ADOPT. run_next is direct-API-safe under BLOCK; TRACE concurrency-safe. Scope held: no RRI/detector/GPU-resume/recurrence change. This closes the two tracked follow-ups; remaining backlog is thin.
note: Do not resume GPU. twoder now on github.com/takasan-aruism/twoder (private) at 0b500db. self-improvement claim „Å™„Åó. C!=H.

observation: Taka-approved FULL_SWAP_CYCLE experiment (Qwen nofp8-sleep -> sleep -> Coder up+verify -> Coder down -> Qwen wake), baseline recorded, rollback-guaranteed. (4) ROLLBACK (auto, finally): docker rm -f codernext_vllm + serve_qwen36_vllm.sh -> :8005 restored to original fp8, qwen_health 189s, generation 200 OK, config_restored_fp8=true, gpu 29568+29895. experiment_ref: DS UTT-0045; EGL RUN-00042 OBS-00096..00101; WebSearch+WebFetch (Claude as acquisition runner)
observation: Routed the Coder init-failure through 2DER (DS->RRI research-required->EGL web/github acquisition), NOT local guessing. SOURCE-TRACED DIAGNOSIS MATRIX for TASK-2DER-GPU-SWITCH-001 full-swap Coder failure (EngineCore/WorkerProc initialization failed while Qwen3.6 sleeping, concurrent containers, 2xRTX5090 sm120 PCIe, tp=2): (A) STRONG: vLLM V1 MULTI-INSTANCE MEMORY ACCOUNTING BUG ‚Äî the 2nd instance (Coder) counts the 1st instance (Qwen, even asleep) memory as non_torch -> negative kv_cache_size -> No available memory for cache blocks -> init fail. matches: 2nd-instance-on-shared-GPU. caveat: nvidia-smi showed Qwen slept to ~2GB, but vLLM V1 accounts ALL memory not just its own (forum 608), so still miscounts. src OBS-00096 (issue #10643, regression v0.6.3->0.6.4+), OBS-00097 (forum 608: V1 does NOT allow reliable multi-instance sharing, no official config fix, recommends sequential/one-per-GPU). (B) STRONG: INTENDED-PATTERN MISMATCH ‚Äî vLLM zero-reload switching requires BOTH servers started WITH --enable-sleep-mode (separate servers, orchestrated sleep/wake); I started Coder FRESH via serve_codernext_vllm.sh which has NO --enable-sleep-mode, cold, AFTER Qwen slept. src OBS-00098 (official vLLM sleep-mode blog). (C) PARTIAL: Blackwell PCIe custom all-reduce worker-init hang -> --disable-custom-all-reduce + NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1; caveat: single Qwen loads fine WITHOUT the flag + that symptom is a HANG not Exited(1). src OBS-00099 (discuss 2540, same GPU gen). (D) WEAK: sleeping-vs-woken memory conflict, issue closed not-planned/doc-gap. src OBS-00100 (#14644). related OBS-00101 (#15254 RLHF selective wake_up tags).
replication_status: DIAGNOSIS_SOURCE_TRACED (6 web/github sources ingested to EGL). Root-cause hypothesis (strong): my swap design started a non-sleep Coder fresh alongside a sleeping Qwen -> multi-instance V1 accounting + not the blog pattern.
decision: RECOMMENDED NEXT BOUNDED EXPERIMENT (source-backed, NOT from Claude memory; requires Taka approval, :8005+:8006 interrupt): follow the vLLM blog pattern = make Coder ALSO --enable-sleep-mode (new serve_codernext_nofp8_sleep.sh) and orchestrate per blog. Candidate mitigations for the accounting bug (each source-backed): (i) start BOTH with sleep-mode before sleeping Qwen; (ii) lower Coder --gpu-memory-utilization; (iii) Qwen sleep LEVEL 2 (discard, no residual); (iv) add --disable-custom-all-reduce + NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1 (Blackwell co-factor). Fallback if multi-instance stays unreliable (forum 608): sequential stop/start (current cold-swap; no sleep benefit). Do NOT claim bottleneck solved / co-serve impossible / policy.
decision_owner: Taka (authority for any :8005 experiment) + Claude Code (acquisition runner + DW manager).
note: 2DER FUNCTION GAP found: the live submit/operator path has NO RESEARCH->web-acquisition route; I ran it manually as acquisition runner. Durable fix = add RRI research_required -> EGL web/github acquisition branch (proposed, not implemented). self-improvement claim „Å™„Åó. C!=H.

observation: ITEM-2DER-EVO-0020 (Phase-03): operator machine-actor exception guard. Surfaced by DE-0226 (first live 0008 run crashed on an actor exception). No :8005/GPU.
decision: Ship the structured exception guard (no swallow, no partial-as-success); recommend 0020 DONE. Guard is hermetic-proven; the live-INTERVENTION-firing path is now wired + hermetically exercised.

observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-CHANGE-CLASSIFIER (Phase-10 Tier-1, first core schema/policy item): twoder.change_classifier. Novelty signals (esde/novel_architecture/new_algorithm/evaluation_unestablished/no_reference_impl) -> CLASS-N; high-impact signals (production/model_routing/evidence_judgment/state_machine/gpu_control/db_migration/security/multi_repo) -> CLASS-H; cosmetic+behavior_unchanged -> CLASS-T; single_module+rollback_easy+iface_unchanged+existing_pattern -> CLASS-S; else CLASS-M. Precedence N>H>T>S>M: novelty dominates, and a cosmetic edit in a high-impact domain stays CLASS-H (conservative). required_audits: N/H = full design/impl/test L1+L2 + triad; M = impl_L1+test_L1 with design_L2 ONLY on interface_change/multiple_modules/design_uncertainty; S = impl_L1+test_L1 (L2 on anomaly); T = mechanical_diff_only. An unknown descriptor defaults to CLASS-M (never silently trivial). test 12/12. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005.
decision: Ship the change classifier as the first Tier-1 item. Audit depth is now derived deterministically from the change's properties and feeds the triad + two-level policy. Recommend child DONE. observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-ESCALATION-ROUTER (Phase-10 Tier-1): twoder.escalation_router. The routing brain that ties the Tier-0 failure machinery together and enforces the spec's core correction: a bad Qwen result is NOT forwarded wholesale to Claude and NOT sent wholesale to the human. route() runs the resource precheck front stage, applies the classifier-schema gate, then routes by class (¬ß13): FAILURE-EXECUTION->IMPLEMENTATION (to_claude L2 impl audit), FAILURE-DESIGN->DESIGN (to_claude False ‚Äî Claude does design L2 audit ONLY, no re-implement, ¬ß13.2), FAILURE-KNOWLEDGE->RESEARCH, FAILURE-TEST->TEST (do not fail the impl for a bad test), FAILURE-RESOURCE->RESOURCE remediation, FAILURE-UNKNOWN->IDENTIFY (no cause fixation). The resource signal FORCES FAILURE-RESOURCE over an impl/design label (¬ß3.2); a triggered retry-guard forces RECLASSIFICATION_REQUIRED instead of routing to a process (¬ß2.3); the human is reached ONLY on the nine ¬ß15 conditions (producing a human-escalation draft for the ledger); a Claude hand-off must carry the ¬ß14 packet (failure_class/approved_specification/affected_domain/raw_evidence/known_constraints/prohibited_changes/expected_output/acceptance_criteria) ‚Äî never 'investigate and fix everything'. test 12/12; failure trio + human-ledger parity green. decision: Ship the escalation router as a Tier-1 item. Failures now route to the correct process by classified cause, escalation is model-agnostic (not a Claude upgrade) and human-minimal (¬ß15 only), and Claude only ever receives a packet. Recommend child DONE. Natural next: HUMAN-ESCALATION-PACKET (the single-decision packet the router's human draft needs) or the domain/interface schemas.

observation: ITEM-2DER-TEMPORAL-PROVENANCE-DECOMPOSITION (¬ß11 deliverable): DECOMPOSITION_v1 (ART ART-90aa3ff6c4). GROUNDED timestamp inventory (actual field inspection): DE ledger 272 rows carry NO timestamp field at all; CHANGE_LOG recorded_at 117/161 filled; ROADMAP registered_at 196/196 but NAIVE; ARTIFACT_REGISTRY fully timestamped; JREV date 7/7; git commit time is the ONLY machine-generated tz-aware clock (+09:00). LOAD-BEARING finding: the ts values passed into set_status/register/admit/record_change are SELF-ASSIGNED by Claude (typed), not read from a wall clock ‚Äî the ¬ß3.1/¬ß3.2 hazard ‚Äî so any velocity from them measures typed numbers, not elapsed time; git commit ts + file_mtime are the only trustworthy retrospective sources. Field diff vs ¬ß4: no timezone anywhere, DE has no recorded_at, no started/completed/wall_clock, no active_work/tool_wait/human_wait split. Retrofit split: git-inferred timing (INFERRED class) for past CHG/DE/ITEM via after_commit hash; go-forward-only for the wait split and true started_at. Completion Definition v1 candidate CDEF-2DER-v1 (version+hash+required_flag_ids each bound to an acceptance artifact + JREV; removal/relaxation needs CHG+DE+JREV). Velocity formula sourced from git (not typed ts) with reference records + forecast output contract (remaining work + expected sessions, not a date; per-session throughput is the meaningful unit; this session=1 sample). UNKNOWN-VARIANCE rule (CLASS-N / no precedent / n<3 / self-typed-only). 10 recommended child units (¬ß12) mapped build-vs-reuse with a suggested order, then ECONOMY-OPERATOR unblocks. NOT done: child ITEM id issuance, code, retrofit, DB change, Completion-Definition approval, independent different-weight review. This deliverable is single-context self-audited.
decision: Deliver the temporal decomposition. observation: ITEM-2DER-TEMPORAL-TEMPORAL-EVENT-SCHEMA (Phase-10 temporal child #1): twoder.temporal_event_schema. The foundation record for time in 2DER (spec ¬ß4 + DECOMPOSITION_v1). Enforces the decomposition's load-bearing rule: a SELF-TYPED timestamp (what Claude passes into the ledgers today) can NEVER be recorded above REPORTED (¬ß3.2); git commit time is MEASURED only when NATIVE (the event is that commit), else INFERRED (a proxy for another record's authoring time); file_mtime native = MEASURED; machine_clock = MEASURED. max_timing_class gives the ceiling; validate_event rejects a tz-naive recorded_at (AC-TIME-01), a missing timezone/source_record_id, an unknown event_type/clock_source, and any timing_class above the clock ceiling. is_measured is true only for a real measurement. test 11/11, incl. the current reality: a self-typed set_status ts recorded as an item_done event is REPORTED, not MEASURED. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005. First of the 10 approved temporal child units; git is the canonical clock.

observation: ITEM-2DER-OFFRAMP-DEP-FLAG-REGISTRY (Phase-11 workstream F): twoder.dep_flag_registry mechanizes the 9-flag off-ramp set (OFFRAMP_FLAGS_v1) as a dependency-aware registry where a flag's status is DERIVED from evidence + dependencies, never asserted. evidence_sufficient requires acceptance_test_ids + run_ids + counterfactual_conditions + approved_by, and jrev_ids additionally for CLASS-N/H ‚Äî a Claude explanation is never sufficient. DEPENDENCY_GRAPH encodes spec ¬ß9: COMMAND_SURFACE_READY<-CONTROL_SURFACE_READ_ONLY_READY; CLASS_T<-LIVE_WORKER_MINIMAL_PASS; CLASS_S<-{CLASS_T, CODING_QUALITY_ACCEPTANCE_PASS, MODEL_ROUTING_READY}; CLASS_M<-CLASS_S; HETEROGENEOUS_L2_AUDITOR_AVAILABLE standalone. EXTERNAL_PREREQS ties MODEL_ROUTING_READY to QWEN35/QWEN27_BENCHMARK_COMPLETE/MODEL_SELECTION_TEST_PASS, while LIVE_WORKER_MINIMAL_PASS has NO benchmark dependency (Taka addition 5). assert_distinct enforces the load-bearing NON-EQUALITY invariant LIVE_WORKER_MINIMAL_PASS != CLAUDE_CODE_IMPL_DEP_REMOVED_CLASS_S/M (CLASS_S is not solely dependent on the live-worker pass). effective_status derives MET only when evidence sufficient AND all dependency flags MET AND external prerequisites MET. registry_report surfaces derived status + deps + external prereqs. test 11/11: all 9 flags currently derive UNMET; a CLASS-S with full evidence stays UNMET until deps+Qwen prereqs MET; MODEL_ROUTING_READY blocked by unmet Qwen prereqs. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005. This closes the anti-overclaim loop: 'UI built / sandbox ran once / design done' cannot flip a flag ‚Äî only evidence + counterfactual runs + met dependencies can.
decision: Ship the dependency-flag registry. Off-ramp progress is now measured by derived flag status with the ¬ß9 graph + non-equality invariant + Qwen deps enforced. Recommend child DONE. Remaining off-ramp: E (counterfactual acceptance harness, deterministic) and D (live worker, GPU/live). The dashboard's flag section could later consume registry_report for derived status + reasons.

observation: INCIDENT MANUAL_TASK_PACKET_BYPASSED_DS_RRI_EGL (recurrence of the known bypass / parallel-pipeline failure pattern). During the Phase-11 off-ramp live-worker slice, Claude built the live-worker backend SEPARATELY, hand-authored the worker task packet, and drove the loop while DS/RRI/EGL(as front) were bypassed; the result was described too broadly as a full 2DER loop. Correct classification: BACKEND_ONLY_PROOF (the real Qwen :8005 slice DE-0300 shows only that the live-worker BACKEND runs). It is NOT a full 2DER loop: raw-input->DS->RRI->EGL->DW-task never ran; the worker input did not derive from real upstream 2DER records. This is a recurrence, not a new independent failure.
decision: Halt implementation in this context-exhausted session. Claim ceiling: LIVE_WORKER_BACKEND_PROVEN is the MOST that may be claimed; FULL_2DER_E2E_PROVEN / CLAUDE_CODE_DEPENDENCY_REMOVED / AUTONOMOUS_DEVELOPMENT_LOOP_COMPLETE remain UNMET. Required prevention: a HARD dispatch invariant so no live-worker dispatch is legal unless the task derives from the real 2DER path (resolvable DS/RRI/EGL/DW references), added in a fresh session that begins with a coverage audit, not coding. The fix is WIRING the existing front half to the existing live-worker back half with the smallest valid edge - NOT building a replacement DS/RRI/planner/orchestrator/ledger. Authoritative fresh-session spec: twoder/docs/NEXT_THEME_wire_existing_front_to_worker.md.
